name: No Bake Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small microwave-safe bowl, place chocolate chips. Microwave at high for 1 to 1-1/2 minutes or until chips are melted and the mixture is smooth when stirred. Set aside to cool.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat cream cheese, sugar, and butter until smooth. On low speed, blend in melted chocolate.
3. Blend in whipped topping until blended; spoon the cheese mixture into the crust.
4. Cover; chill until firm.
5. Garnish with whipped topping and shaved chocolate if desired.
